summary: Rhododendron williamsianum ( Chinese: 圆 叶 杜鹃; pinyin: yuányè dùjuān ), the Williams rhododendron, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family Ericaceae. It is native to forested slopes at 1,800–2,800 m (5,900–9,200 ft) in western Guizhou, southwestern Sichuan, southeastern Xizang and northeastern Yunnan in southern and western China.
